config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmTongHopXuatHopChatSon
Nút WinForms gốc: Đóng · Lưu
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_ORDER_GET2, TR_ORDER_GETALL, TR_ORDER_GETALLBYCUSTOMER, TR_ORDER_GETBYSTATUS, TR_ORDER_GETCONTAINER, TR_ORDER_GETLIST, TR_ORDER_Get3, TR_TONGHOP_XUAT_HOPCHAT_INSERT
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_order, tr_order_replacement
